title: Arachniodes nigrospinosa
taxonomy: Arachniodes nigrospinosa is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a member of the genus Arachniodes, which consists of mostly Asian and Pacific fern species. Arachniodes nigrospinosa is native to Japan and is often found growing in shaded, humid environments. The classification of this fern is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. This classification is based on the fern's distinctive characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other fern species.
uses: Arachniodes nigrospinosa, also known as the Black-scaled Lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia.
